pieces.title: Untitled as of yet
pieces.text:
### `Verse 1`

Another sad song but I'm feeling good...Like I wish you could

Well I've seen the future and I've seen the past...It don't take long and it doesn't last

So where do we go from here...I'm out of patience and your out of fear

Don't trust in me and I won't disappoint...honestly it could do us both some good

Given what you said what I heard...the shoe on the other foot dropped long ago

### `Chorus`

So here's to the ones still living back then


Chained to a phantom you're calling a friend

I won't call it a loss, I won't call it a crime


You just ran out of reasons, I ran out of time

### `Verse 2`

You're still on the platform, I'm gone with the train…same song, same ghost, same room gone cold


What's dead in the mirror is dead in the past…no gold in the storm cloud no matter how hard you hope


You wanted an anchor, I wanted a door…can't be the one you keep waiting for


Say it was love if it helps you sleep…I called it a habit I couldn't keep


Wave from the wreck if it eases the ache…there's nothing back there I'd want back to take

### `Chorus`

So here's to the ones still living back then

Chained to a phantom you're calling a friend

I won't call it a loss, I won't call it a crime

You just ran out of reasons, I ran out of time

### `Bridge`

Yeah I built the door and I walked on through


Won't pretend that it didn't take something too


But I'd rather bleed moving than rot standing still


You can stay if you want to I never will

### `Chorus`

So here's to the ones still living back then

Chained to a phantom you're calling a friend

I won't call it a loss, I won't call it a crime

You just ran out of reasons, I ran out of time
